'''zhapuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ivorytyping|ivorytyping]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-p-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ivorytyping|ivorytyping]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhapuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæpizith|zhæpizith]] || [[word:zhæpizij|zhæpizij]] || [[word:zhæpizish|zhæpizish]] || [[word:zhæpizi|zhæpizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhapupuzuth|zhapupuzuth]] || [[word:zhapupuzuj|zhapupuzuj]] || [[word:zhapupuzush|zhapupuzush]] || [[word:zhapupuzu|zhapupuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhapuzuth|zhapuzuth]] || [[word:zhapuzuj|zhapuzuj]] || [[word:zhapuzush|zhapuzush]] || [[word:zhapuzu|zhapuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhapufzuth|zhapufzuth]] || [[word:zhapufzuj|zhapufzuj]] || [[word:zhapufzush|zhapufzush]] || [[word:zhapufzuf|zhapufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhapuzuthu|zhapuzuthu]] || [[word:zhapuzuju|zhapuzuju]] || [[word:zhapuzushu|zhapuzushu]] || [[word:zhapuzuku|zhapuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhapuzuth|zhapuzuth]] || [[word:zhapuzuj|zhapuzuj]] || [[word:zhapuzush|zhapuzush]] || [[word:zhapuzu|zhapuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhapuzuthul|zhapuzuthul]] || [[word:zhapuzujul|zhapuzujul]] || [[word:zhapuzushul|zhapuzushul]] || [[word:zhapuzukul|zhapuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhapuzuthuthu|zhapuzuthuthu]] || [[word:zhapuzujuju|zhapuzujuju]] || [[word:zhapuzushushu|zhapuzushushu]] || [[word:zhapuzuku|zhapuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhapuzuthun|zhapuzuthun]] || [[word:zhapuzujun|zhapuzujun]] || [[word:zhapuzushun|zhapuzushun]] || [[word:zhapuzukun|zhapuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhapuzuthuoro|zhapuzuthuoro]] || [[word:zhapuzujuoro|zhapuzujuoro]] || [[word:zhapuzushuoro|zhapuzushuoro]] || [[word:zhapuzukuoro|zhapuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
